name: spark
description: Spark — an offline-first, no-guilt ADHD habit and focus tracker.

scripts.test: npm run test:scripts && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:scripts && npm run test:ci --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:scripts && npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @spark/cloud-contracts && npm run build --workspace @spark/domain
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @spark/admin && npm run build --workspace @spark/mobile && npm run build --workspace @spark/control-plane
